---
id: get-widget-data
title: "Resolve Widget Data"
description: "Retrieve all the data necessary to display a widget, according to its configuration in the `data` and `resource` fields."
sidebar_label: "Resolve Widget Data"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: docs/api/tagoio-api

<Heading as={"h1"} className={"openapi__heading"} children={"Resolve Widget Data"}></Heading>

<MethodEndpoint method={"get"} path={"/data/{dashboardID}/{widgetID}"} context={"endpoint"}></MethodEndpoint>

Retrieve all the data necessary to display a widget, according to its configuration in the `data` and `resource` fields.
